summary.overall_narrative: The masonry wall project involved laying blocks, mixing and applying mortar, and finishing joints. Workers were observed performing block placement, mortar mixing, and joint finishing tasks. The project seemed to be progressing steadily with multiple workers involved.

tasks_observed.observations: Blocks were being placed on top of each other, with mortar in between. Workers were using levels and trowels to ensure proper alignment.
Workers were mixing mortar in a large bucket, using a drill and paddle to achieve the right consistency.
No joint finishing tasks were observed, but tools such as trowels and jointers were visible on site.
